'''Hadocrassk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] and the [[Speaker-Above-All]] of [[Trandosha/Legends|Trandosha]] prior to the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
During the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], Hadocrassk met with the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] representative [[Yarua/Legends|Yarua]] in [[Hsskhor/Legends|Hsskhor]], to discuss a truce between the long-feuding natives of Trandosha and [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. Hadocrassk was of the opinion that the Wookiee species received preferential treatment in the Senate, to the detriment of his own people. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Oppo Rancisis/Legends|Oppo Rancisis]] was called in to mediate the talks, which were ultimately abandoned when it was revealed that the Trandoshans were lobbying the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] to help them earn joint Senate representation.
